body:
- Replace Prisma ORM (prisma, @prisma/client, @prisma/adapter-pg, pg) with
  Supabase JS SDK for all 44 API routes — single client for auth + data
- New src/lib/db.ts: createClient with SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (no codegen,
  no postinstall hook, no SSL workaround, smaller bundle)
- Remove prisma/ directory and all schema.prisma files
- Remove 'prisma generate' from build and postinstall scripts
- Migrate all services: ai-concierge, qr-service, reminder-service
- Replace src/types/index.ts: local type definitions instead of @prisma/client
- Rename use-firestore-sync.ts → use-realtime-sync.ts (no Firebase, uses
  Supabase Realtime which was already in place)
- Rename FirestoreSettings.tsx → RealtimeSyncSettings.tsx
- Move services/firestore/offline-db.ts → services/offline/offline-db.ts
  (pure IndexedDB, never was Firebase)
- Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to .env.example

https://claude.ai/code/session_0152kgs817iFqjnL6EVx7wF2

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Chores**
  * Modernized backend infrastructure with streamlined database integration and optimized query patterns for improved system reliability and performance.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

comments.body: [vc]: #CWp/6Qs7je469+YIks0nXtGGQ8gQGTspgIlBUNoFwPI=: The latest updates on your projects. Learn more about [Vercel for GitHub](https://vercel.link/github-learn-more). | Project | Deployment | Actions | Updated (UTC) | | :--- | :----- | :------ | :------ | | [wedding](https://vercel.com/nessbr-projects/wedding) | ![Error](https://vercel.com/static/status/error.svg) [Error](https://vercel.com/nessbr-projects/wedding/BxHRgfUB9tPmxajLK3zbwzAyFuNv) | | Feb 24, 2026 1:21am |

📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough Migrates the entire application from Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL to Supabase's PostgREST API. Removes Prisma schema, CLI dependencies, and lifecycle scripts. Refactors 60+ API route files to use `db.from()` query patterns. Replaces Prisma-generated types with locally defined TypeScript types. ## Changes |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Configuration & Database Layer**
`.env.example`, `package.json`, `src/lib/db.ts`|Added SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY. Removed Prisma/PostgreSQL packages (prisma, `@prisma/client`, `@prisma/adapter-pg`, pg, `@types/pg`) and lifecycle scripts. Replaced Prisma client with Supabase createClient via NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.| |**Schema & Type System**
`prisma/schema.prisma`, `src/types/index.ts`|Deleted entire Prisma schema (30 models, 10 enums, 709 lines). Introduced locally-defined TypeScript types for Wedding, Event, Guest, GuestGroup, Rsvp, Table, MessageTemplate, MessageLog, Invitation, ConversationMessage, Settings, plus composite types (DashboardStats, RecentActivity, GuestFormData).| |**API Routes - Accommodations & Budget**
`src/app/api/accommodations/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/accommodations/route.ts`, `src/app/api/budget/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/budget/route.ts`|Replaced ORM calls with `db.from('Table').select/update/delete/insert` patterns. Added explicit error handling, ISO timestamp fields, and UUID generation via crypto.randomUUID(). Updated error messages to Portuguese.| |**API Routes - Check-In & Analytics**
`src/app/api/checkin/[token]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/checkin/route.ts`, `src/app/api/analytics/route.ts`|Refactored token-based and name-based search to direct table queries. Consolidated analytics data fetching via parallel Promise.all queries instead of sequential ORM calls. Restructured response payloads with flattened guest/invitation data.| |**API Routes - Checklist & Events**
`src/app/api/checklist/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/checklist/route.ts`, `src/app/api/events/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/events/route.ts`|Migrated ORM queries to from/select/update/delete pattern. Added dueDate ISO string handling, explicit completed/completedAt logic, and event ordering via order() chains. Consolidated wedding lookups with maybeSingle().| |**API Routes - Concierge Features**
`src/app/api/concierge/conversations/route.ts`, `src/app/api/concierge/qrcode/route.ts`, `src/app/api/concierge/stats/route.ts`, `src/app/api/dashboard/stats/route.ts`|Replaced nested Prisma includes with explicit from/select joins. Simplified QR code generation to require invitationId only. Restructured stats aggregation via array operations on fetched data. Auto-creates wedding on first access in dashboard.| |**API Routes - Gifts, Groups & Guests**
`src/app/api/gifts/[id]/[reserve/]route.ts`, `src/app/api/gifts/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/gifts/route.ts`, `src/app/api/groups/assign/route.ts`, `src/app/api/groups/route.ts`, `src/app/api/guests/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/guests/[id]/thank-you/route.ts`, `src/app/api/guests/export/route.ts`, `src/app/api/guests/route.ts`|Uniform migration to from/select/update/delete queries. Removed legacy Gift DELETE reserve endpoint. Added guest creation with automatic RSVP rows for all events. Restructured group responses with computed \_count fields instead of nested arrays. Updated export to flatten RSVP data.| |**API Routes - Invitations, RSVPs & Tables**
`src/app/api/invite/[token]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/rsvp/route.ts`, `src/app/api/tables/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/tables/route.ts`|Migrated to single from queries with explicit guest/event joins. Removed guest status increment logic from RSVP. Consolidated table assignments via parallel updates. Simplified unassigned group retrieval. Updated GET signature in tables/route.ts to remove unused request parameter.| |**API Routes - Messaging, Scheduling & Templates**
`src/app/api/email/send/route.ts`, `src/app/api/scheduler/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/scheduler/route.ts`, `src/app/api/templates/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/templates/route.ts`|Removed Prisma generate from build. Simplified email routing to per-guest processing with verifySupabaseToken auth. Removed GET scheduler endpoint. Removed bulk scheduler DELETE. Restructured template CRUD with explicit existence checks before update/delete.| |**API Routes - Transport, Vendors & Utilities**
`src/app/api/transport/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/transport/route.ts`, `src/app/api/vendors/[id]/route.ts`, `src/app/api/vendors/route.ts`, `src/app/api/wedding/route.ts`, `src/app/api/weather/route.ts`, `src/app/api/seed/route.ts`, `src/app/api/sync/route.ts`|Unified ORM→from pattern across all routes. Updated signatures to single-line parameters. Wedding GET now auto-creates on first access with default fields. Seed flow simplified to check existence, create wedding/events/groups, and populate guests/RSVPs. Weather route now accepts NextRequest with optional lat/lon params. Sync route restructured to POST for status (body-based) and GET for data (query-based).| |**API Routes - Webhooks & Real-time**
`src/app/api/webhook/whatsapp/route.ts`|Streamlined webhook processing: replaced fragmented async workflow with compact handler. Removed auxiliary helpers (findOrCreateInvitation, getConversationHistory). Now stores inbound/outbound ConversationMessages and delegates AI processing to concierge.processMessage with minimal context object.| |**Services - Concierge & QR**
`src/services/concierge/ai-concierge.ts`, `src/services/concierge/qr-service.ts`|Replaced Prisma-specific types with generic record types. Updated processMessage to support dual call signatures. Refactored data access to from/select patterns. Updated confirmGuest/declineGuest to upsert RSVP rows per guest-event. Removed db parameter from generateQrCodesForConfirmed and processCheckIn; now use global db import.| |**Services - Reminders**
`src/services/reminder/reminder-service.ts`|Migrated ReminderService from ORM to from/select patterns. Renamed sendReminders to sendReminder with added type and customMessage parameters. Restructured config/stats retrieval via from queries. Introduced UpcomingReminder array return from getUpcomingReminders. Updated timestamp handling to ISO strings throughout.| |**Components & Hooks**
`src/components/settings/RealtimeSyncSettings.tsx`, `src/hooks/use-offline-checkin.ts`, `src/hooks/use-realtime-sync.ts`|Renamed FirestoreSettings component to RealtimeSyncSettings (and interface FirestoreSettingsProps to RealtimeSyncSettingsProps). Updated import paths for offline DB types from firestore module to new offline module (no functional changes).| ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 4 (Complex) | ⏱️ ~90 minutes ## Poem > 🐰 *From prisma's structured grove to Supabase's cloud*, > *We hop through queries now, more loosely allowed.* > *No more schema trees or migrations so tight—* > *Just from() and select(), we're fetching just right!* > *The database dances with PostgREST's refrain,* > *And our types—oh our types!—are TypeScript again!*
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 2 | ❌ 1 ### ❌ Failed checks (1 warning) | Check name | Status | Explanation | Resolution | | :----------------: | :--------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Docstring Coverage | ⚠️ Warning | Docstring coverage is 7.78% which is insufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (2 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :---------------: | :------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The PR title clearly and concisely summarizes the main change: migrating from Prisma ORM to Supabase JS SDK and removing Firebase references, which aligns perfectly with the extensive changes across the codebase. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (stacked PR) - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (commit on current branch)
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `claude/evaluate-platform-c3Slc`

title: refactor: migrate from Prisma to Supabase JS SDK, remove Firebase references
